titleStmt.title: SII 26.788: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 788. (A.R. No. 737 of 1909.) PŪRATTUKŌYIL, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulaśēkharadēva: Year 4, •••• śu. (the tithi not mentioned), Monday, Rōhiṇī = 1316 A.D., November 29. The tithi was śu. 15.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the beginning. So, some passages have been lost.

It records a gift of the village of Aḻagiya Sēmanallūr as kuḍinīṅgā dēvadāna made by the king, by sending his order through Sēmāṇḍāṉ to the temple of Tirumuttīśuram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Kaḍavaṉkuḍi in Mudiyakkuḍi in Vaḍa-Kōṉāḍu in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Kaḍalaḍaiyādilaṅgai[koṇḍa]śōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the gift was to take effect from the 19th in the month of Mārgaḻi in the 4th year of the reign of the king corresponding to 1316 A.D., December 15, Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkomāṟa(p)(o)ṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 vatu kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkai
coḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu Uṟattūr kūṟṟattu vaṭakoṉāṭṭu mutiyakkuṭināṭṭu kaṭavaṉ kuṭi Uṭaiyār tirumutticuramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟ
tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka pūrvapakṣattu tiṅkaḷkiḻamai Urocaṇi nāḷ cemāṇṭāṉ Olai kaṭavaṅkuṭi Uṭaiyār
ramuṭai yaṉā tāṉattar kaṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku nālāvatu mārkaḻi mātam pattoṉpatām tiyati me
yāṉ Aḻakiyacemanallūr kuṭiniṅkā tevatāṉamāka Āyaṅkaḷ Aṉaittu vaṟkaṅkaḷum ka
ṭuttu Itu cantirātittavaṟku pāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikoḷva ḷḷum Ippaṭiceytu koḷvatel
kku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Uṟattūr Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ku ppūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai
l peraiyan kuṭikkāṭṭu Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai putukkuṭi Ellaikku teṟku Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nilamum pu
mu Uḷpaṭṭaṉa Ellaām kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Ivai cemiṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻakiyacoḻappiramārāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.788 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
